overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves from a dark street under an elevated highway, past a prominent teal building with 'SOFT' signage, through green-lit and red-lit neon pedestrian zones. The scene features heavy artificial neon lighting in cyan, green, and magenta hues typical of Night City.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The camera walks forward along the asphalt road as a futuristic sedan passes by. Orange construction barriers line the right side, and distant neon signs glow in the background.

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the street to the sidewalk, approaching a prominent teal building with 'SOFT' signage and a distinctive circular window. The area is illuminated by cyan and purple neon advertisements. The elevated highway recedes into the background as the camera moves toward the building entrance.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a green-lit pedestrian overpass, following other pedestrians walking ahead. The area is bathed in green neon light from overhead tubes. A blue Market sign is visible on the right wall, and holographic advertisements glow in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the green-lit overpass into an area dominated by red and pink neon storefront lighting. The sidewalk continues past commercial buildings with glowing red facades and futuristic kiosks. Pedestrians walk in both directions, with one person passing close by on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins on a dark asphalt street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, moving past orange construction barriers as a futuristic sedan glides by. As the camera transitions to the sidewalk, the highway recedes and the lighting shifts to cyan and purple hues while approaching a prominent teal building featuring a circular window and SOFT signage. The scene then moves under a pedestrian overpass bathed in intense green neon light, following a crowd of people past a blue Market sign and glowing holograms. Finally, the camera emerges from the green glow into a bustling pedestrian zone dominated by red and pink storefronts and futuristic kiosks.
